documentation.content:
The emailQueueWorker scheduled function hasn't emitted its per-tick heartbeat in over 30 minutes. It runs every 1 minute and now logs a heartbeat on EVERY tick (even when the queue is empty), so a 30-minute gap means the worker has silently stopped — which stops delivery of GDPR-erasure confirmation emails and Stripe dunning emails with no other signal.

Investigation:
  1. gcloud functions logs read emailQueueWorker --project nobigdeal-pro --gen2 --limit 50
  2. gcloud scheduler jobs list --project nobigdeal-pro | grep emailQueueWorker
  3. Check the RESEND_API_KEY / EMAIL_FROM secrets are still set (the worker no-ops + logs 'Resend not configured' if not — that still heartbeats, so a true gap is a crash/deploy/scheduler problem).
  4. Inspect email_queue for a pile-up of status='pending' or status='sending' rows.

See documentation/runbooks/ for the email-pipeline runbook (Audit #4 Phase 3).

conditionAbsent.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name="emailQueueWorker" AND jsonPayload.message="emailQueueWorker" AND severity="INFO"
